name: Agni
description: Soma's highly-dedicated butler, Agni comes with his master to England in search of Meena. Agni is a master at Indian cooking, and has even shown some skill in landscaping (turning the bushes in the Phantomhive Manor's garden into topiary elephants, for instance). But even more impressive than his cooking skills is his martial arts ability. When he and Soma meet Ciel and Sebastian, Soma orders the butlers to fight. In a move that surprises even Sebastian, Agni proceeds to give the demon a run for his money. In battle, he attacks his enemy's marmam, or pressure points, which can result in paralysis or death. In addition, his right hand has been blessed by the goddess Kali, giving him enhanced strength.
